headline: Palantir Is Down 7% Today: Is It Underperforming Software Peers Like Palo Alto and CrowdStrike?
summary: Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR) stock is the standout laggard in enterprise software at midday Monday, sliding 7% to around $120. The move tracks with Fuse data showing PLTR shares down 6% on the session, while the broader high-multiple software cohort barely budges. Compare that to the day’s scoreboard for the named peers. Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ:PANW) ... Palantir Is Down 7% Today: Is It Underperforming Software Peers Like Palo Alto and CrowdStrike?

headline: Scales Tip to Small Business from Large Enterprise in IT Spend: Pax8 CEO Scott Chasin, Live from Pax8 Beyond 2026
summary: Watch Video Highlights Below, or Click HERE: Tech Edge hosted a fireside chat on June 8 at Pax8 Beyond 2026 in Salt Lake City with Scott Chasin, Chief Executive Officer at Pax8. headline: CrowdStrike vs. Zscaler: Which Cybersecurity Stock Has an Edge?
summary: ZS gains an edge over CRWD, with expanding platform adoption and a lower valuation despite strong cybersecurity demand.
